title: stelis globulifera
intro: Stelis globulifera, also known as the Globular Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis globulifera include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
